tweets.text:
One of my buddies is 6'4, built like a greek god, and is single-handedly breaking the dating economy.

Exclusively dates women who are clearly not in his league who lose their sh*t over him.

Only dude I know with a negative CAC 💀

Last week a girl who slid in his DMs showed up

The conversation I have with every new hire:

"I don't want u to blindly do ur job. I want u to do what's right for the business."

Most people have been trained their whole career to execute without questioning.

Show up. Hit the brief. Don't make waves.

That's not what I'm

I track 5 numbers every single Monday morning before I even open a single email:

MRR: growing or shrinking
Churn rate: who left and why
CAC: are we acquiring efficiently
Takedowns completed: is the team performing
Open client issues: what's on fire

Everything else is noise
